---
title: "Music Practice"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.home-intro {
  font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--site-ink-2); max-width: 48rem;
  margin: 0 0 2rem; line-height: 1.7;
}
.home-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.home-card {
  background: var(--parch-2); border: 1px solid var(--parch-edge);
  border-radius: .5rem; padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
  text-decoration: none; color: inherit;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .3rem;
  transition: border-color .15s, box-shadow .15s;
}
.home-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--site-accent); color: inherit;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(63,194,180,.15);
  text-decoration: none;
}
.home-card-eyebrow {
  font-size: .7rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .08em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--site-accent-dk);
}
.home-card-title {
  font-weight: 600; font-size: .97rem; color: var(--parch-ink);
}
.home-card-desc {
  font-size: .84rem; color: var(--site-ink-2); line-height: 1.5;
}
.home-section-head {
  font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--parch-dim);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--parch-edge); padding-bottom: .35rem;
  margin: 1.75rem 0 .85rem;
}
</style>

<p class="home-intro">
  Rhythm, melody, and song — tools for music students from kindergarten through
  high school. Practice on your own, or follow a session your teacher has set up.
</p>

<div class="home-section-head">Practice</div>
<div class="home-grid">
  <a class="home-card" href="practice/rhythm-sequences.html">
    <div class="home-card-eyebrow">Rhythm</div>
    <div class="home-card-title">Rhythm Sequences</div>
    <div class="home-card-desc">Build rhythmic vocabulary pattern by pattern.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="home-card" href="practice/tonal-sequences.html">
    <div class="home-card-eyebrow">Melody</div>
    <div class="home-card-title">Tonal Sequences</div>
    <div class="home-card-desc">Practice melodic patterns by ear and by sight.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="home-card" href="practice/songs.html">
    <div class="home-card-eyebrow">Composition</div>
    <div class="home-card-title">Song Builder</div>
    <div class="home-card-desc">Assemble rhythm and melody cells into a short piece.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="home-card" href="practice/patterns.html">
    <div class="home-card-eyebrow">Melody</div>
    <div class="home-card-title">Tonal Patterns</div>
    <div class="home-card-desc">Stepwise and harmonic patterns, major and minor.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="home-card" href="practice/rhythms.html">
    <div class="home-card-eyebrow">Rhythm</div>
    <div class="home-card-title">Rhythm Patterns</div>
    <div class="home-card-desc">Notated rhythm reading and performance.</div>
  </a>
</div>

<div class="home-section-head">Assessment</div>
<div class="home-grid">
  <a class="home-card" href="practice/assessment-tune.html">
    <div class="home-card-eyebrow">Pitch &amp; Rhythm</div>
    <div class="home-card-title">Tune Assessment</div>
    <div class="home-card-desc">Perform a tune; get scored on pitch and rhythm accuracy.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="home-card" href="practice/assessment.html">
    <div class="home-card-eyebrow">Melody</div>
    <div class="home-card-title">Tonal Accuracy</div>
    <div class="home-card-desc">Sing or play back tonal patterns on demand.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="home-card" href="practice/assessment-rhythm.html">
    <div class="home-card-eyebrow">Rhythm</div>
    <div class="home-card-title">Rhythmic Accuracy</div>
    <div class="home-card-desc">Perform rhythm patterns and see your timing.</div>
  </a>
</div>

<div class="home-section-head">Teacher tools</div>
<div class="home-grid">
  <a class="home-card" href="teacher/session-builder.html">
    <div class="home-card-eyebrow">Assign</div>
    <div class="home-card-title">Session Builder</div>
    <div class="home-card-desc">Write a guided practice session and share the link.</div>
  </a>
  <a class="home-card" href="teacher/report.html">
    <div class="home-card-eyebrow">Review</div>
    <div class="home-card-title">Teacher Report</div>
    <div class="home-card-desc">Time on task, plays, and note interactions by student.</div>
  </a>
</div>
```
